{{ form.name.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.name(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.price.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.price(class="form-control", step="100") }}
{{ form.quantity.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.quantity(class="form-control", step="0.01") }}
{{ form.unit.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.unit(class="form-select") }}
{{ form.expiry_date.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.expiry_date(class="form-control", type="date") }}
